document_text: BCG launched Deckster in 2022, cutting deck creation time by 30% across 200 pilot engagements.
question: When was Deckster launched and what was the impact?
ai_answer: BCG launched Deckster in 2021, reducing time by 50% across 500 engagements.
explanation: Source says 2022, 30%, 200 engagements. All three key values are hallucinated.
